category_sources: source_facts.description says wayback is an archiving tool integrated with archival services.
source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official docs site for wabarc wayback.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives the project name as wayback.
source_facts.repo identifies the official wabarc/wayback repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site.
source_facts.repo points to the official repository whose README is the source-adjacent documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/wabarc/wayback, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists the wayback CLI executable.
